question: According to the Lumina Accords, what is the designated purpose of 'quiet zones'?

answers.original: The Lumina Accords do not mention 'quiet zones'.

entities.name: Lumina Accords
entities.description: The Lumina Accords are a set of agreements signed after a conflict between two major federations, containing 27 articles governing trade, diplomacy, and cohabitation.

entities.description: Standard habitat construction materials must be non-toxic to all member species.
